title: Daily show and Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Daily show and Evangelion             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Sat Nov 20, 2010 7:01 pm I was reading the tvtropes entry for the Daily show with Jon Stewart and when I got to the shout out section. I read this: Give the banks bailout money or everything you love and hold dear will become Tang So, do you think it's a reference to Evangelion? I cannot find the video, but I wouldn't be surprised its a case of Ascended Meme, since he has used memes such as Its a trap, The Wahmmbulance, and 2 girls 1 cup.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sat Nov 20, 2010 7:35 pm I'd call that a pretty good guess. The meme proper is, "everyone gets hugged and turns into Tang."

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Nov 20, 2010 9:33 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: It's possible that a few Daily Show writers might have seem NGE and it could very well have been an intentional reference but I have heavy doubts about it being an intended reference.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sat Nov 20, 2010 9:42 pm I think they went hunting for memes for use in jokes, not knowing that the "tang" reference came from this fandom.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Nov 20, 2010 10:41 pm that could be an Eva reference, but I would need to see the vid, and if there was an Eva action figure garage kit or something in the shot for context, like a harpy or Rei or something

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:08 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: that could be an Eva reference, but I would need to see the vid, and if there was an Eva action figure garage kit or something in the shot for context, like a harpy or Rei or something

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Sun Nov 21, 2010 12:55 am If Jon Stewart knew what Eva was I'd piss myself laughing.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sun Nov 21, 2010 2:30 am Google tells me that the episode in question was on the October 8th 2010. Unfortunately, the video isn't on the Comedy Central website, so I have no way of verifying this/actually hearing John say that. Btw: Banks confirmed for Seele agents.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 21, 2010 8:54 am Thank you, Holy Diver, for providing the date of the episode. It was actually October 7th but providing a date made finding the clip much more convenient nonetheless. Here is the clip in question. The possible Eva reference is at around 00:55.

[]: John, I am disappoint.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun Nov 21, 2010 4:39 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Thank you, Holy Diver, for providing the date of the episode. It was actually October 7th but providing a date made finding the clip much more convenient nonetheless. Here is the clip in question. The possible Eva reference is at around 00:55.

[]:             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Sun Nov 21, 2010 8:29 pm It seems John Stewart needs to both 1) lurk moar and 2) conceal his power level.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Sun Nov 21, 2010 10:25 pm Sun Stealer wrote: It seems John Stewart needs to both 1) lurk moar and 2) conceal his power level.

[]:             Quote Post by Naminator » Mon Nov 22, 2010 12:11 am Well it's pretty obvious that he didn't know where the meme came from, but it was a pretty funny video anyway :) JS always delivers quality stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Mon Nov 22, 2010 1:19 am I wouldn't be surprised at all if that did turn out to be an Eva reference. Nothing about it suggests otherwise, really.

[]: Hahaha, you're reading my post subject! Loser. ^_^             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Nov 22, 2010 9:03 pm Born of Lilith wrote: I wouldn't be surprised at all if that did turn out to be an Eva reference. Nothing about it suggests otherwise, really.

[]: Re: Hahaha, you're reading my post subject! Loser. ^_^             Quote Post by Shinji » Mon Nov 22, 2010 9:06 pm Killer Bee wrote: I'd say the fact that he specifically refers to the actual drink would suggest otherwise, but what do I know?

[]: wat             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Nov 22, 2010 9:39 pm Shinji wrote: And I don't think astronauts drink LCL, that would be disgusting

[]:             Quote Post by Shinji » Mon Nov 22, 2010 9:51 pm Jon stewart was like they'll be turned into tang the substitute for orange juice while astronauts drink them, i'm paraphrasing tho but he said something like that

[]: Kaworu's an asstronaut.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Nov 22, 2010 11:56 pm Shinji wrote: Jon stewart was like they'll be turned into tang the substitute for orange juice while astronauts drink them, i'm paraphrasing tho but he said something like that

[]: African-American brother plz             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Tue Nov 23, 2010 2:08 am Killer Bee wrote: I'd say the fact that he specifically refers to the actual drink would suggest otherwise, but what do I know?
summary: []: Daily show and Evangelion             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Sat Nov 20, 2010 7:01 pm I was reading the tvtropes entry for the Daily show with Jon Stewart and when I got to the shout out section. I read this: Give the banks bailout money or everything you love and hold dear will become Tang So, do you think it's a reference to Evangelion? I cannot find the video, but I wouldn't be surprised its a case of Ascended
